name: /serve
tagline: Secure HTTPS Server Utility for Pi
description: Serves local directories securely using SSL/HTTPS certificates in a lightweight background process.

usage.desc: Serve specified directories (default: public, docs) on HTTPS ports.
Discover and display the active servers list.
Hide the active servers list from the screen.
List all active servers serving directories within this repository.
Kill all servers serving directories within this repository.
Kill specific servers by port number or directory name (even external ones).

examples.desc: Serves public/ on 8080 and docs/ on 8081.
Serves src/ on 8080 and assets/ on 8081.
Kills server on port 8080 and server serving docs/.
